title: Super Mario Paint - Instant Crush (Daft Punk)
description:
I just happened to get this polished off a few days before April 1 and I seem to have an occasional history of uploading on that date, so why not. I labeled it as a different, better-known Daft Punk song for the day. Hilarious.

I'm quite happy with how this one turned out. It'd been sitting at ~70% complete for at least a year and change before I finally got off my butt. Instant Crush really does perfectly capture a laser-focused kind of melancholy that I don't think any other piece of music ever has. Shoutout to 8BitDanooct1's FamiTracker cover as one of my primary references. This is either the first or second time YouTube has wagged its finger at me and said "hang on now, we're picking up on copyrighted wavelengths" but thankfully whatever it thinks this is specifically, I'm at least allowed to publish it.

Also, turn on closed captions if you feel like listening to what might charitably be described as venting with debatable artistic license.
